---
title: "AntSciHub"
listing:
  - id: templates-list
    contents: "Templates/**/*Template.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: _listing/templates-list.ejs.md
    fields: [title, description]
    sort: title
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

## Fewell/Gadau Pogonomyrmex Aggression Experiments 2026

## Hourly images

Images are added hourly from the experiment's shared Google Drive folder. [Open the full gallery in Google Drive](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1_FTjq9eCrMPpMv7LBHbXa2w8Y6Adnxjn){target="_blank"}

<iframe src="https://drive.google.com/embeddedfolderview?id=1_FTjq9eCrMPpMv7LBHbXa2w8Y6Adnxjn#grid" title="Hourly Pogonomyrmex experiment images" loading="eager" width="100%" height="720">

</iframe>
